category_sources: source_facts.description says cpio copies files into or out of cpio or tar archives; GNU cpio homepage confirms archive formats.
display_name_sources: Official GNU homepage title and introduction identify the project as GNU cpio.
docs_sources: Official GNU cpio homepage links online documentation; GNU cpio manual page is the dedicated manual.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official GNU homepage points development sources to Savannah, and Savannah Git repository listing gives the clone URL https://git.savannah.gnu.org/git/cpio.git.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and GNU homepage describe archive creation/extraction and tar/cpio archive support.
